metadata.site_scope: Exercises 1, 2 descriptive growth note, 3, 4, 6, 10, 11, and the country-size-effect robustness page.

metrics.product_gini: Active Product Gini (observed positive HS6 products)
metrics.partner_gini: Active Partner Gini (observed positive trade partners)
metrics.product_partner_cell_gini: Active Product-partner cell Gini (observed positive HS6-by-partner cells)

exclusions.full_exclusion: No oil, precious metals, aircraft, ships, arms

top_goods.desc: Aeroplanes and other aircraft, except unmanned; of an unladen weight exceeding 15,000kg
Automatic data processing machines; portable, weighing not more than 10kg, consisting of at least a central processing unit, a keyboard and a display

Communication apparatus (excluding telephone sets or base stations); machines for the reception, conversion and transmission or regeneration of voice, images or other data, including switching and routing apparatus

Units of automatic data processing machines; processing units other than those of item no. 8471.41 or 8471.49, whether or not containing in the same housing one or two of the following types of unit: storage units, input units or output units
Machines and mechanical appliances; having individual functions, n.e.c. or included in this chapter
Oils; petroleum oils and oils obtained from bituminous minerals, crude
Coal; (other than anthracite and bituminous), whether or not pulverised but not agglomerated
Petroleum gases and other gaseous hydrocarbons; liquefied, natural gas
Petroleum gases and other gaseous hydrocarbons; liquefied, butanes
Petroleum gases and other gaseous hydrocarbons; liquefied, propane
Jewellery; of precious metal (excluding silver) whether or not plated or clad with precious metal, and parts thereof
Television cameras; n.e.c. in item no 8525.8
Nuts, edible; cashew nuts, fresh or dried, in shell
Vegetables, leguminous; peas (pisum sativum), shelled, whether or not skinned or split, dried
Vegetables, leguminous; pigeon peas (Cajanus cajan), shelled, whether or not skinned or split, dried
Metals; gold, non-monetary, unwrought (but not powder)
Electronic integrated circuits; processors and controllers, whether or not combined with memories, converters, logic circuits, amplifiers, clock and timing circuits, or other circuits
Communication apparatus; parts, other than aerials and aerial reflectors of all kinds
Diamonds; non-industrial, unworked or simply sawn, cleaved or bruted, but not mounted or set
Vegetable oils; palm oil and its fractions, crude, not chemically modified

Communication apparatus (excluding telephone sets or base stations); machines for the reception, conversion and transmission or regeneration of voice, images or other data, including switching and routing apparatus
Automatic data processing machines; portable, weighing not more than 10kg, consisting of at least a central processing unit, a keyboard and a display

Aeroplanes and other aircraft, except unmanned; of an unladen weight exceeding 15,000kg
Electrical static converters
Oils; petroleum oils and oils obtained from bituminous minerals, crude

Petroleum oils and oils from bituminous minerals, not containing biodiesel, not crude, not waste oils; preparations n.e.c, containing by weight 70% or more of petroleum oils or oils from bituminous minerals; not light oils and preparations

Petroleum oils and oils from bituminous minerals, not containing biodiesel, not crude, not waste oils; preparations n.e.c, containing by weight 70% or more of petroleum oils or oils from bituminous minerals; light oils and preparations
Petroleum gases and other gaseous hydrocarbons; liquefied, natural gas
Petroleum gases and other gaseous hydrocarbons; in gaseous state, natural gas
Telephone sets; smartphones for cellular or other wireless networks
Vehicles; with only spark-ignition internal combustion reciprocating piston engine, cylinder capacity over 1500 but not over 3000cc
Vehicles; with only electric motor for propulsion
Vehicles; with both spark-ignition internal combustion piston engine and electric motor for propulsion, incapable of being charged by plugging to external source of electric power
Vehicles; with only spark-ignition internal combustion piston engine, cylinder capacity over 1000 but not over 1500cc
Electronic integrated circuits; processors and controllers, whether or not combined with memories, converters, logic circuits, amplifiers, clock and timing circuits, or other circuits
Metals; gold, non-monetary, unwrought (but not powder)
Medicaments; consisting of mixed or unmixed products n.e.c. in heading no. 3004, for therapeutic or prophylactic uses, packaged for retail sale
Electronic integrated circuits; n.e.c. in heading no. 8542
Blood, human or animal, antisera, other blood fractions and immunological products; immunological products, put up in measured doses or in forms or packings for retail sale
